backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend defining QuoteRequest types and product variants, with functions to submit/retrieve quote requests and query static contact info, business hours, and WhatsApp link.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that updates the stored WhatsApp link to the correct company number `https://wa.me/918918832546` while preserving all other actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: updating the backend WhatsApp link and replacing the navigation logo with a gold SS monogram, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one- to two-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing typography updates, component changes, and WhatsApp link corrections across the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark color themes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title set to 'SS Global Trades' and a root div that mounts the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order and renders the floating WhatsAppButton overlay outside the main content flow.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Us section displaying company description for SS GLOBAL TRADES alongside three pillar cards (Quality First, Ethical Sourcing, Global Reach) with gold-accented styling.
frontend/src/components/FAQSection.tsx: FAQ section rendering six accordion items covering MOQ, shipping, samples, customs, returns, and custom packaging with Montserrat font-black headings.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick links, product links, and contact details including email, phone, and address. Includes smooth-scroll navigation and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background hair product image, headline, trust badges, and CTA buttons for requesting a quote or ordering a sample via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with an SS monogram logo, smooth-scroll nav links, and a responsive mobile menu toggle that changes style on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ProcessSection.t: Displays a 5-step quality process (sourcing to delivery) as a horizontal timeline on desktop and a vertical step list on mobile.
Renders a grid of five hair product cards (bundles, closures, wigs, bulk supply, OEM) each with an image, subtitle, title, and description.
frontend/src/components/QuoteSection.tsx: Renders a contact/quote section with a form for submitting quote requests (name, email, company, product, requirements) and displays contact info and business hours fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Displays a static grid of three client testimonial cards with quotes, names, titles, and locations for SS GLOBAL TRADES.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp button that links to a dynamically fetched or fallback WhatsApp URL, with a hover tooltip and pulse animation.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a static grid section highlighting six key differentiators of SS GLOBAL TRADES with icons, titles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and returns an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching contact info, business hours, and WhatsApp link from the backend actor, plus a mutation hook for submitting quote requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with a luxury dark theme using custom OKLCH color tokens for gold, charcoal, and cream palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Montserrat, Inter), fluid font sizes, oklch-based color palette (including gold, charcoal, cream, and WhatsApp green), custom shadows, and animation keyframes. Enables dark mode via class, and includes the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state (version 11) of the SS Global Trades B2B single-page website project, recording architectural notes, contact details, known issues, and a list of already-implemented features such as hero, about, products, quality process, testimonials, FAQ, and quote form sections.
